character_attributes_basics.description: Common rules for HP, stamina, hunger, rest, and character resources. Every character knows this by default.
entries: Character attribute basics: HP represents physical condition; a character dies when HP reaches 0.

Character attribute basics: stamina represents available effort; action stamina costs are fixed, and hunger does not make the same action cost extra stamina. Standard stamina recovery is 5 points per 10 minutes.

Character attribute basics: hunger falls non-linearly; it takes about 4 hours to fall from 100 to 50, at 50 the stamina cap is about 70, and lower hunger falls more slowly. Hunger at 0 continuously reduces HP.
Character attribute basics: rest falls while awake and recovers through sleep; low rest lowers the stamina cap.
Character attribute basics: characters do not have mana; magical energy lives in items such as wands, not in character attributes.
